items.title: STRUCTURAL-FRONTEND-PANEL
items.body: `StructuralPanel.jsx` â€” tabbed React UI wiring 24 arch_* LLM backend tools (previously 0/17 surfaced in UI) into 5 tabs. Tab 1 Beam & Slab (4 tools: `arch_compute_beam_deflection`, `arch_compute_slab_deflection`, `arch_check_punching_shear`, `arch_check_slab_on_grade`); Tab 2 Lateral Loads (4 tools: `arch_compute_wind_load`, `arch_compute_wind_cc_pressure`, `arch_check_lateral_bracing`, `arch_check_diaphragm_shear`); Tab 3 Connections (5 tools: `arch_design_base_plate`, `arch_check_bolt_shear`, `arch_check_anchor_pullout`, `arch_design_lintel`, `arch_check_opening_in_wall`); Tab 4 Walls & Footings (5 tools: `arch_compute_bearing_capacity`, `arch_check_retaining_wall_stability`, `arch_check_pier_axial`, `arch_check_bearing_wall_axial`, `arch_check_shear_wall_oop`); Tab 5 Stairs & Misc (2 tools: `arch_design_stair_stringer`, `arch_check_column_load`). All tools dispatch `POST /api/tools/call`; PASS/FAIL chips on capacity checks; inline result tables with honest_caveat truncation. Routes `/structural` and `/arch` added to `App.jsx` (lazy-loaded, public). `src/components/arch/StructuralPanel.jsx`. Code refs: ASCE 7-22, ACI 318-19, AISC 360-22, TMS 402-22

items.title: WRAPPER-MODULE-CONSOLIDATION
items.body: Collapsed 8 `*_tools.py` wrapper files (ToolSpec + register only, no math) into their core implementation modules using the standard gated-import pattern (`try: from kerf_chat.tools.registry import ...; except ImportError: pass`). Files deleted: `assembly_interference_tools.py`, `face_planarity_tools.py`, `brep_connect_inspector_tools.py`, `offset_far_tools.py`, `network_surface_tools.py`, `topology_euler_check_tools.py`, `vertex_degree_check_tools.py` (geom/), `bolt_shear_aisc_tools.py` (arch/). `plugin.py` `_TOOL_MODULES` updated to reference core modules directly. ~1,750 LOC saved. 151 tests pass. No behaviour change

items.title: OPTICS-FRONTEND-PANEL
items.body: `OpticsDesignPanel.jsx` â€” tabbed React UI wiring 42 optics LLM backend tools into 5 tabs. Tab 1 Lens Design (8 tools: `optics_lensmaker`, `optics_thin_lens_imaging`, `optics_two_lens_system`, `optics_achromat_powers`, `optics_fnumber`, `optics_numerical_aperture`, `optics_depth_of_field`, `optics_ray_trace_lens_stack`); Tab 2 Aberrations (8 tools: `optics_seidel_aberrations`, `optics_compute_coma`, `optics_compute_seidel_coma`, `optics_chromatic_aberration`, `optics_compute_chromatic_focus`, `optics_compute_petzval_curvature`, `optics_distortion_map`, `optics_compute_abbe_number`); Tab 3 MTF / PSF (7 tools: `optics_compute_diffraction_mtf`, `optics_mtf_across_field`, `optics_compute_spot_diagram`, `optics_compute_diffraction_psf`, `optics_compute_pixel_mtf`, `optics_airy_spot`, `optics_defocus_curve`); Tab 4 Pupils & Field (7 tools: `optics_pupil_diagram`, `optics_compute_vignetting`, `optics_compute_entrance_pupil`, `optics_compute_exit_pupil`, `optics_compute_relative_illum_map`, `optics_compute_vignetting_check`, `optics_compute_telecentricity`); Tab 5 Utilities (12 tools: `optics_design_schmidt_corrector`, `optics_fit_zernike_wavefront`, `optics_analyze_wavefront_alignment`, `optics_snell`, `optics_critical_angle`, `optics_brewster_angle`, `optics_prism_deviation`, `optics_mirror_imaging`, `optics_compute_working_fno`, `optics_compute_lens_volume`, `optics_compute_iris_diameter_map`, `optics_compute_sagitta_arrow_chart`, `optics_compute_depth_of_field`, `optics_trace_chief_ray`, `optics_abcd_system`). All tools dispatch `POST /api/tools/call` with inline number/table result display. Default BK7 biconvex singlet pre-filled for surface-stack tools. Route `/optics` added to `App.jsx` (lazy-loaded, public). `src/components/optics/OpticsDesignPanel.jsx`

items.title: ELEC-OPENEMS-BRIDGE
items.body: openEMS FDTD geometry export bridge for PCB microstrip/stripline RF routes. `export_to_openems(rf_route: OpenEMSRoute, output_xml_path: str) -> OpenEMSExportResult` in `kerf_electronics.routes_rf`. Dataclasses: `OpenEMSRoute` (trace_width_mm, trace_length_mm, trace_thickness_mm, substrate_thickness_mm, z_trace_mm, eps_r=4.4, tan_d=0.02, sigma_conductor=5.8e7, f_center_Hz, f_cutoff_Hz, num_timesteps=100000, end_criteria=1e-5, port_impedance_ohm=50.0, num_mesh_cells_per_wavelength=15, name, ports); `OpenEMSExportResult` (xml_path, num_primitives, num_ports, frequency_range_Hz, mesh_resolution_mm, honest_caveat). Algorithm: writes a CSXCAD/FDTD XML file openEMS can ingest directly (`openEMS <file.xml> --NrThreads=4`). XML structure: `<openEMS>` root; `<FDTD NumberOfTimesteps="..." endCriteria="..." f_max="...">` with `<Excitation Type="0" f0="..." fc="...">` (Gaussian pulse); `<BoundaryCond xmin="PML_8" ... zmax="PML_8">` (8-cell PML on all 6 faces); `<ContinuousStructure>` with `<Materials>` (substrate Epsilon+Kappa, copper Kappa=sigma, PEC Kappa=1e15), `<Primitives>` (substrate_slab Box, ground_plane Box, trace Box; per-port voltage Probe Type=0 + current Probe Type=1 + DumpBox), `<RectilinearGrid>` XLines/YLines/ZLines (fine under trace, 3Ă— coarser in Î»/4 air buffers). Mesh resolution = Î»_min/cells_per_lambda capped at trace_thickness/2. FILE EXPORT ONLY â€” openEMS is not invoked. `run_openems_study` endpoint updated to return XML base64 with status `done`. 50 tests green. HONEST: SINGLE STRAIGHT TRACE ONLY â€” bends, vias, differential pairs, multi-layer stack-ups not modelled; FR-4 eps_r/tan_d frequency-independent (real FR-4 ~10% dispersion; use Djordjevic-Sarkar for wideband); copper roughness not modelled (Hammerstad-Jensen 1.3â€“2.0Ă— at 10+ GHz); mesh is uniform rectilinear (SmoothMeshLines reduces cells 5â€“10Ă—); lumped port valid below first higher-order mode; validate against Wheeler Z0 formula. Refs: openEMS manual Â§3+Â§6; Pozar "Microwave Engineering" 4e Â§3.8; Taflove "Computational Electrodynamics"; IPC-4101C /26 â€” `packages/kerf-electronics/src/kerf_electronics/routes_rf.py`
